prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is F-101 Structural framing within 2.6 Carpentry & Finishes. The relevant subcategory is 2.6.1 Rough Framing. The observed field condition is: missing jack studs. The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors IRC R502, R602. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T2 F-101 Document interpretation
